message:
ci: Add real iCloud link integration test with daily schedule

Add comprehensive integration testing infrastructure:

CI Workflow Enhancements:
- Add workflow_dispatch trigger for manual test runs
- Add daily schedule (3am UTC) for regression detection
- New 'real-link-test' job that downloads from actual iCloud share
- 30-minute timeout to handle slow network conditions
- Caches giil dependencies between runs for faster execution
- Only runs on manual trigger or schedule (not on push/PR)

Test Scripts (scripts/):
- real_link_test.sh: Downloads real iCloud photo and verifies SHA256
  - Uses known stable share link for reproducible testing
  - Validates JSON output structure (path, method fields)
  - Compares SHA256 against expected hash for regression detection
  - Properly configures GIIL_HOME and PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH

- check_playwright_setup.sh: Diagnostic script for Playwright setup
  - Verifies Node.js, npm, npx availability
  - Checks for Playwright module in GIIL_HOME
  - Validates Chromium browser installation
  - Useful for debugging CI failures

- real_icloud_expected.sha256: Expected hash for test image

.gitignore:
- Ignore .ci-cache/ (CI dependency cache)
- Ignore .ci-output/ (CI test artifacts)

This enables automated regression testing against real iCloud infrastructure,
catching issues that mocked tests might miss (CDN changes, UI updates, etc.).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,9 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 3 * * *'
 
 jobs:
   shellcheck:
@@ -85,6 +88,32 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           "${HOME}/.local/bin/giil" --help | head -20
 
+  real-link-test:
+    name: Real iCloud Link Test
+    needs: [shellcheck, syntax-check]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' || github.event_name == 'schedule' }}
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20.10.0'
+
+      - name: Cache giil dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: .ci-cache
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-giil-${{ hashFiles('giil') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-giil-
+
+      - name: Run real-link test
+        run: |
+          bash scripts/real_link_test.sh
+
   version-consistency:
     name: Version Consistency
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+CACHE_HOME="${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}"
+GIIL_HOME="${GIIL_HOME:-$CACHE_HOME/giil}"
+PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH="${PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH:-$GIIL_HOME/ms-playwright}"
+
+status=0
+
+log_info() { echo "[check] $*"; }
+log_warn() { echo "[warn]  $*"; }
+log_err() { echo "[error] $*"; }
+
+log_info "GIIL_HOME=${GIIL_HOME}"
+log_info "PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=${PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH}"
+
+if ! command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    log_err "node not found in PATH"
+    status=1
+else
+    log_info "node: $(node --version)"
+fi
+
+if ! command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    log_warn "npm not found in PATH (needed for first-time install)"
+else
+    log_info "npm: $(npm --version)"
+fi
+
+if ! command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    log_warn "npx not found in PATH (needed for Playwright install)"
+else
+    log_info "npx: $(npx --version)"
+fi
+
+if [[ -d "${GIIL_HOME}/node_modules/playwright" ]]; then
+    log_info "Playwright module found"
+else
+    log_warn "Playwright module not found at ${GIIL_HOME}/node_modules/playwright"
+    log_warn "Run: giil --update  (or run giil once)"
+    status=1
+fi
+
+if [[ -d "${PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH}" ]]; then
+    shopt -s nullglob
+    chromium_dirs=("${PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH}"/chromium*)
+    shopt -u nullglob
+
+    if (( ${#chromium_dirs[@]} > 0 )); then
+        log_info "Chromium browser found: ${chromium_dirs[0]}"
+    else
+        log_warn "No Chromium browser directory under ${PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH}"
+        log_warn "Run: giil --update  (or run giil once)"
+        status=1
+    fi
+else
+    log_warn "PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH does not exist"
+    log_warn "Run: giil --update  (or run giil once)"
+    status=1
+fi
+
+if [[ "$status" -eq 0 ]]; then
+    log_info "Playwright setup looks good (no downloads performed)"
+else
+    log_warn "Playwright setup incomplete"
+fi
+
+exit "$status"

@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+LINK="https://share.icloud.com/photos/02cD9okNHvVd-uuDnPCH3ZEEA"
+EXPECTED_SHA_FILE="scripts/real_icloud_expected.sha256"
+
+if [[ ! -f "$EXPECTED_SHA_FILE" ]]; then
+    echo "[error] Missing expected SHA file: $EXPECTED_SHA_FILE" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+EXPECTED_SHA=$(tr -d '[:space:]' < "$EXPECTED_SHA_FILE")
+if [[ -z "$EXPECTED_SHA" ]]; then
+    echo "[error] Expected SHA file is empty" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+CACHE_ROOT="${GIIL_HOME:-$PWD/.ci-cache/giil}"
+OUTPUT_DIR="$PWD/.ci-output"
+OUTPUT_JSON="$OUTPUT_DIR/output.json"
+
+mkdir -p "$OUTPUT_DIR"
+
+export GIIL_HOME="$CACHE_ROOT"
+export PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH="$GIIL_HOME/ms-playwright"
+export XDG_CACHE_HOME="${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$PWD/.ci-cache}"
+
+./giil "$LINK" --json --output "$OUTPUT_DIR" --timeout 120 > "$OUTPUT_JSON"
+
+read -r OUTPUT_PATH METHOD < <(python - << 'PY' "$OUTPUT_JSON"
+import json, sys
+with open(sys.argv[1], 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
+    data = json.load(f)
+print(data.get('path', ''))
+print(data.get('method', ''))
+PY
+)
+
+if [[ -z "$OUTPUT_PATH" || ! -f "$OUTPUT_PATH" ]]; then
+    echo "[error] Output file missing: $OUTPUT_PATH" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+if [[ -z "$METHOD" ]]; then
+    echo "[error] Missing capture method in JSON output" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+ACTUAL_SHA=$(sha256sum "$OUTPUT_PATH" | awk '{print $1}')
+
+if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA" != "$EXPECTED_SHA" ]]; then
+    echo "[error] SHA mismatch" >&2
+    echo "expected: $EXPECTED_SHA" >&2
+    echo "actual:   $ACTUAL_SHA" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "[ok] Real-link download SHA matches expected ($ACTUAL_SHA)"
